About

From Self-Taught Trader to Pakistan's Pioneer

With a background in Cyber Security and over 8 years of market experience, Saad combines technical precision with deep institutional trading concepts. He built Pakistan's first Smart Money Footprints course and free trading communities across the country.

His mission is simple: make profitable, ethical, and data-driven trading accessible to every Pakistani — regardless of background or budget.
